data.title: Blue Moon Metals Confirms Final Investment Decision to Construct Nussir Project Mine, Intention to Construct the Springer Tungsten Mine and Concurrent C$150 Million Bought Deal Equity Offerings
data.description: The Shelf Prospectus, along with the Supplement, will be available for viewing on SEDAR+ platform within two business days. Both documents can be accessed through the Company's issuer profile.

data.title: CACI Achieves Amazon Web Services Managed Service Provider Status for its Secure, Compliant Hybrid Cloud Solutions
data.description: Reston-based CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) has recently been designated as an Amazon Web Services (AWS) Managed Service Provider (MSP). This new accolade further enhances CACI's array of technical and business achievements attained through effective hybrid cloud strategies and strong credentials, combining seamless edge-to-cloud services with verified round-the-clock operational support for critical mission operations. The company's commitment to innovative approaches underscores its dedication to revolutionizing client workflows through proactive investments.

data.title: Morocco Strategic Minerals increases private placement size.
data.description: In the latest report, it has been highlighted that the current unemployment rate in the country has reached 6.2%, with over 9.4 million individuals currently out of work. The data also revealed that the GDP growth for the last quarter was at 2.5%, showing a slight increase in economic activity. Additionally, it was noted that the inflation rate has risen to 3.1%, posing a challenge for the central bank to stabilize prices. The government has announced plans to introduce new policies to address these economic concerns and boost job creation in the coming months.

data.title: INNOVATE Corp. to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 14th
data.description: On April 27, 2026, INNOVATE Corp. (NYSE: VATE) revealed its plan to disclose the financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2026 on May 14, 2026, post-market closure. The company will conduct an earnings conference call on May 14, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss the results, operational information, and strategic insights.

data.title: Trupanion Publishes 2025 Annual Letter to Shareholders
data.description: On April 27, 2026, Trupanion, Inc. (Nasdaq: TRUP), a renowned provider of pet medical insurance, released its 2025 annual shareholder letter authored by CEO and President Margi Tooth. Interested parties can access the letter on the company's Investor Relations website.

data.title: Benchmark at Haverhill Crossings Assisted Living Community Named Among Nation's Best in 2026 U.S. News & World Report Senior Living Ratings
data.description: Haverhill Crossings, a senior assisted living community in Haverhill, Massachusetts, achieved top honors due to exceptional feedback from residents and their families. The community, offering Assisted Living and Mind & Memory Care services, was acknowledged as one of the premier senior living facilities. This recognition was received on April 27, 2026.

data.title: UNIVERSAL HEALTH REALTY INCOME TRUST REPORTS 2026 FIRST QUARTER FINANCIAL RESULTS
data.description: Universal Health Realty Income Trust (NYSE:UHT) reported its quarterly earnings for the three-month period ending on March 31, 2026. The company, headquartered in King of Prussia, Pa., revealed a net income of $5.0 million for this period. Additionally, they disclosed various other financial metrics, showcasing their performance and stability in the market.

data.title: Benchmark Senior Living at Leominster Crossings Assisted Living Community Named Among Nation's Best in 2026 U.S. News & World Report Senior Living Ratings
data.description: Leominster Crossings, a Senior Assisted Living Community in Leominster, Massachusetts, has recently received acclaim for its exceptional services. The community, offering Assisted Living and Mind & Memory Care, was lauded for its commitment to resident and family satisfaction. This recognition was conferred upon Leominster Crossings for being among the top establishments in its field. The achievement was announced on April 27, 2026. The company responsible for this remarkable performance is Benchmark Senior Living.

data.title: Oruka Therapeutics Announces Proposed $500 Million Underwritten Public Offering
data.description: Oruka Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Menlo Park, California, has announced the initiation of an underwritten public offering. The offering includes $500 million worth of shares of its common stock and pre-funded warrants for certain investors who opt for them instead of common stock. Additionally, Oruka plans to provide the underwriters with a 30-day option to purchase up to an extra $75 million of common stock at the offering price, excluding underwriting fees. The completion of the offering is contingent on market conditions and other factors, with no guarantee regarding the timing, size, or terms of the offering. Oruka is offering all the common stock and pre-funded warrants in this proposed public offering.

data.title: The Branches of North Attleboro Assisted Living Community Named Among Nation's Best in 2026 U.S. News & World Report Senior Living Ratings
data.description: The Branches of North Attleboro, located in North Attleboro, Massachusetts, received top honors for being one of the best senior assisted living communities. This Benchmark Assisted Living and Mind & Memory Care facility was acknowledged for its excellence due to positive feedback from residents and their families. This recognition was awarded on April 27, 2026.

data.title: Benchmark Senior Living at Nashua Crossings Assisted Living Community Named Among Nation's Best in 2026 U.S. News & World Report Senior Living Ratings
data.description: One of the top senior living communities in Nashua, New Hampshire, Benchmark Senior Living at Nashua Crossings, recently received prestigious honors for exceptional service. The Assisted Living and Mind & Memory Care facility garnered recognition based on resident and family feedback. This acknowledgment underscores the high level of satisfaction within the community. The achievement was announced on April 27, 2026, showcasing the dedication and excellence of the staff at Nashua Crossings. Residents and their families have contributed to the commendation, solidifying the community's reputation for providing top-tier senior care services.

data.title: COPT Defense Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Columbia, Maryland, COPT Defense Properties (NYSE: CDP) reported its first-quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026. The President & CEO, Stephen E. Budorick, stated that the company delivered strong performance, with FFO per share surpassing the mid-point of the guidance range by $0.01. All aspects of the full-year plan are on track. The exact figures and details of the performance were not disclosed.

data.title: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. Provides Q1 2026 Results, Q2 2026 Guidance, Reaffirms Full Year Core FFO and FFO Outlook, Updates EPS Outlook
data.description: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) based in Arlington, Va., disclosed its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 compared to the same period in 2025. In Q1 2026, the Company reported Earnings per Share – diluted (“EPS”) at $2.33, reflecting a 40.4% increase from $1.66 in Q1 2025. Funds from Operations attributable to common stockholders - diluted (“FFO”) per share was $2.72 in Q1 2026, a decrease of 2.2% from $2.78 in Q1 2025. Core FFO per share remained stable at $2.83 in both Q1 2026 and Q1 2025. This information demonstrates the Company's financial growth and stability during the specified period.

data.title: Public Storage Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Public Storage, listed on NYSE as PSA, released its earnings report for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. Net income per share increased by 32.8% from $2.04 in 2025 to $2.71 in 2026. Core funds from operations (Core FFO) per share also saw a slight uptick from $4.12 to $4.22, marking a 2.4% increase. The company also disclosed its updated outlook for the full-year 2026. Additionally, they announced the pending acquisition of National S, as part of the highlights for the quarter.

data.title: Kilroy Realty Corporation Reports First Quarter Financial Results
data.description: Los Angeles-based Kilroy Realty Corporation (NYSE: KRC) announced its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company reported a successful quarter with strong execution in all areas of its business. First-quarter leasing activity reached 568,000 square feet, marking the Company’s best performance for a first quarter since 2017. The company capitalized on the increasing momentum in the West Coast region.

data.title: TFI International Reports on Shareholders’ Voting Results for the Election of Directors
data.description: On April 27, 2026, in Montreal, the Board of Directors of TFI International Inc., a major player in the transportation and logistics sector in North America, conducted its Annual Meeting of shareholders. During the meeting, all proposed director candidates were successfully voted into the Board by a majority of the votes cast by shareholders represented through proxy. TFI International is listed on both NYSE and TSX under the ticker symbol TFII.

data.title: Enovix to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 13, 2026
data.description: In Fremont, California on April 27, 2026, Enovix Corporation, listed on Nasdaq as ENVX, disclosed their upcoming financial report for Q1 2026. The company, known for its innovative lithium-ion batteries and unique silicon-anode designs, is set to release these results on May 13, 2026, post-market closure.

data.title: UNIVERSAL HEALTH SERVICES, INC. ANNOUNCES FINANCIAL RESULTS FOR THE THREE-MONTH PERIOD ENDED MARCH 31, 2026
data.description: Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE: UHS) disclosed the consolidated results of operations for the three-month periods ending on March 31 for 2026 and 2025. The reported net income attributable to UHS for 2026 was $348.7 million.
